# arif-fazil.com — machine-readable index

## Role
Human-first professional homepage for Muhammad Arif bin Fazil (Arif Fazil), with deeper machine-readable layers for origin and proof.

## Canonical routes
- `/` — present-layer homepage for humans, collaborators, and first-contact readers
- `/000/` — genesis and wisdom archive explaining how arifOS was forged
- `/999/` — trust and proof chamber with public verification artifacts

## Related public surfaces
- `https://wiki.arif-fazil.com` — documentation shell
- `https://aaa.arif-fazil.com` — protocol and operator cockpit
- `https://mcp.arif-fazil.com` — runtime and tools surface
- `https://geox.arif-fazil.com` — earth intelligence apps

## Human summary
Arif Fazil is a senior exploration geoscientist and AI systems architect. The work centers on evidence, uncertainty calibration, route clarity, and governed machine systems rather than symbolic branding.

## Verification surfaces
- `/page.json`
- `/llms.json`
- `/.well-known/agent.json`
- `/.well-known/did.json`
- `/proof/geologist-credential.json`

## Source
- Repository: `https://github.com/ariffazil/arif-sites`
- Canonical domain: `https://arif-fazil.com`
